chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 610 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.3622/2016. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.3623/2016. 21.11.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate files power on behalf of applicant, same is taken on record. Matter is pending since 2016 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Even today, nine years later, counsel merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
